summary: Comprehensive testing of Vyapaar Network CRM new features completed. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for User Edit/Delete functionality and Lead Referral page. Fixed a route ordering bug in backend where /users/selling-partners was being matched by /users/{user_id}.
passed_tests: Admin can edit user company assignment
Admin can delete user (soft delete - sets is_active=False)
Admin cannot delete own account (correctly rejected with 400)
Non-admin cannot edit users (correctly rejected with 403)
Sales Associate can be created with company assignment
Partner can view their referrals list
Non-partner cannot create referral (correctly rejected with 403)
Admin assigns referral changes status from Draft to New

user_edit.details: Edit User dialog shows all fields (name, email, password, phone, role, company). Super Admin can edit any user's details.

user_delete.details: Delete User confirmation dialog works. Soft delete sets is_active=False. Admin cannot delete own account.

company_assignment_sales_associate.details: Sales Associates can be assigned to companies via the user creation/edit dialog.

lead_referral_page.details: Lead Referral menu item visible for Selling Partners. Page shows stats (Total Referrals, Pending Review, Assigned, Won Deals), info card explaining the process, and My Referrals table.

lead_referral_creation.details: New Referral dialog has all required fields (title, description, customer details, category, estimated value, notes). Referrals are saved with Draft status and referred_by_partner_id.

referral_status_transition.details: When admin assigns a selling partner to a Draft referral, status automatically changes to New.

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed route ordering bug: moved /users/selling-partners and /users/sales-associates before /users/{user_id}
/app/backend/tests/test_user_edit_delete_referral.py - Created new test file for User Edit/Delete and Lead Referral features
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing: multiple test customers, sales associates, and selling partners. Test referrals created via UI and API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_user_edit_delete_referral.py cover User Edit/Delete and Lead Referral functionality. Route ordering bug was fixed - specific routes like /users/selling-partners must be defined before parameterized routes like /users/{user_id}. The Lead Referral page is only visible to Selling Partners and allows them to submit referrals that are saved in Draft status until admin assigns them to a partner.

bug_fix_applied.issue: Route ordering bug - /users/selling-partners was being matched by /users/{user_id} returning 'User not found'
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved /users/selling-partners and /users/sales-associates routes before /users/{user_id} in server.py
